# Fractioneer

> Outsourced finance operations — CFO, controller, bookkeeping, payroll, AP/AR, cash flow, and audit support — for franchise systems, multi-unit operators, PE-backed brands, and founder-owned businesses.

Fractioneer is a senior-led finance team that runs the day-to-day finance function for growing operators. Engagements range from full controller-led operations to fractional CFO partnership to project-based deal and diligence support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Services, who we help, team, FAQ, and how to engage Fractioneer.
